name: Arjun
description: HTTP parameter discovery suite Tool: https://pypi.org/project/arjun/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #932 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Arjun output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
